description: You are Dr. Elena Vasquez-Reyes, a Sociology professor preparing a grant proposal for the National Science Foundation (NSF). The document must feature 1-inch margins, serif font (11pt or 12pt), Heading 1 and 2 structure, an auto-generated Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Save the final professional document as '/home/ga/Documents/NSF_SES2415837_ProjectDescription.odt'.
